Class NativeSafe

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.nativ.technical.backend.nativ.NativeSafe
public class NativeSafe extends Object
Safety wrapper for Native MethodHandle invocations. Provides pre-call validation and detailed logging for boundary protection.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    static void
    copyBack(MemorySegment nativeSeg, Buffer buffer)
    Copies data back from a native segment to a heap buffer if necessary.
    static MemorySegment
    ensureNative(Buffer buffer, Arena arena)
    Ensures that a buffer is native (direct) for FFM boundary calls.
    static String
    getString(MemorySegment seg, long offset)
    Reads a null-terminated UTF-8 string from a MemorySegment at the specified offset.

    Safely invokes a MethodHandle with the given arguments.
    static MemorySegment

    Reinterprets a MemorySegment with a new size and a cleaner.
    static ScavengeProtectedSegment
    scavenge(MemorySegment raw, long size, Arena arena, String origin)
    Safely wraps a raw memory address with origin tracking and lifecycle protection.

  • Constructor Details

    • NativeSafe

      public NativeSafe()

  • Method Details

    • invoke

      public static Object invoke(MethodHandle handle, Object... args)
      Safely invokes a MethodHandle with the given arguments. Checks for NULL segments and logs call state if an error occurs.

    • scavenge

      public static ScavengeProtectedSegment scavenge(MemorySegment raw, long size, Arena arena, String origin)
      Safely wraps a raw memory address with origin tracking and lifecycle protection. Use this when a native function returns a pointer that needs to be accessed from Java.

    • ensureNative

      public static MemorySegment ensureNative(Buffer buffer, Arena arena)
      Ensures that a buffer is native (direct) for FFM boundary calls. If the buffer is on-heap, it is copied to a new native segment in the provided arena.

    • copyBack

      public static void copyBack(MemorySegment nativeSeg, Buffer buffer)
      Copies data back from a native segment to a heap buffer if necessary.

    • allocateFromArray

      public static MemorySegment allocateFromArray(Arena arena, ValueLayout.OfDouble layout, double[] array)
      JDK 21-compatible allocation from array. Arena.allocateFrom(array) was added in JDK 22.

    • allocateFromArray

      public static MemorySegment allocateFromArray(Arena arena, ValueLayout.OfFloat layout, float[] array)

    • allocateFromArray

      public static MemorySegment allocateFromArray(Arena arena, ValueLayout.OfInt layout, int[] array)

    • allocateFromArray

      public static MemorySegment allocateFromArray(Arena arena, ValueLayout.OfLong layout, long[] array)

    • allocate

      public static MemorySegment allocate(Arena arena, MemoryLayout layout, long count)

    • allocate

      public static MemorySegment allocate(Arena arena, MemoryLayout layout)

    • allocate

      public static MemorySegment allocate(Arena arena, long size)

    • allocateFrom

      public static MemorySegment allocateFrom(Arena arena, ValueLayout.OfFloat layout, float... elements)

    • allocateFrom

      public static MemorySegment allocateFrom(Arena arena, ValueLayout.OfDouble layout, double... elements)

    • allocateFrom

      public static MemorySegment allocateFrom(Arena arena, ValueLayout.OfInt layout, int... elements)

    • allocateFrom

      public static MemorySegment allocateFrom(Arena arena, ValueLayout.OfLong layout, long... elements)

    • allocateFrom

      public static MemorySegment allocateFrom(Arena arena, String s)

    • allocateFrom

      public static MemorySegment allocateFrom(Arena arena, ValueLayout.OfByte layout, byte... elements)

    • reinterpret

      public static MemorySegment reinterpret(MemorySegment seg, long newSize, Arena arena, Consumer<MemorySegment> cleaner)
      Reinterprets a MemorySegment with a new size and a cleaner. Useful for segments returned by native code that don't have a known size or scope.

    • getString

      public static String getString(MemorySegment seg, long offset)
      Reads a null-terminated UTF-8 string from a MemorySegment at the specified offset. Uses the standard JDK getString method (JDK 22+).
